narrative:
Coshocton 2-B (precinct in Coshocton County) has 768 registered voters, with 69.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.3 percentage points.
